headline: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Invests in a $10B AI Buildout Initiative
summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the best growth stocks to buy, according to billionaire Ray Dalio’s Bridgewater Associates. On June 11, Reuters reported that NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the anchor investors in a new company with more than $10 billion in committed capital to finance AI buildout. Helix Digital Infrastructure is the […]

headline: Cramer Gives Vistra His Blessing, Backs Stryker, Steers Clear Of AI-Exposed FICO
summary: Jim Cramer endorsed Vistra, expressed caution on Fair Isaac over AI risks: "I'm not going to get in the crosshairs anymore."
